headline: Hi, I'm
Dipti
Ghiya
bio: I am a software engineer based in the San Francisco Bay Area, originally from Pune, India. I spent 5 years building backend systems at companies like Avalara and Accenture before moving to the US to pursue my Master's in Computer Engineering at SJSU. It was a big leap but the kind worth taking.

I genuinely enjoy solving problems that have real stakes, systems that handle real users, real data, and real consequences when something breaks. Lately I have been going deep on agentic AI and systems programming, building things that push me outside what I already know.

When I am not at my laptop I am cooking something new, exploring the Bay Area one neighborhood at a time, hiking a trail, or playing badminton. Basically anything that gets me away from the screen, until a new problem pulls me back.
